similar_questions.question: Alice has a deck of  $48$  cards,  $6$  suits of  $8$  cards each. She picks any  $24$  cards and gives the rest to Bob. Now each turn Alice picks any of her cards and lays it face-up onto the table, then Bob similarly picks any of his cards and lays it face-up onto the table. If this pair of cards has the same suit or the same value, Bob gains a point. What is the maximum number of points he can guarantee regardless of Alice’s actions?
